content.question: The long-term labor-market and civic outcomes (earnings, employment stability, political participation) of students who remained in a comprehensive system versus those tracked into lower academic grades in Hungary remain unquantified.
content.reduction_path: A linked administrative register study (tax authority, labor force survey, electoral records) following cohorts 20+ years post-secondary-entry, comparing tracked vs. comprehensive-entry outcomes within Hungary or using a quasi-experimental discontinuity at a reform boundary.
